executionHistory.summary: Manual cross-check verified spec implementation files exist on disk: web/pwa/{manifest.json,sw.js,index.html,app.js,lib/queue.js,embed.go} (PWA shell + share target + offline queue), web/extension/{manifest.json,manifest.firefox.json,background.js,popup/popup.{html,js},lib/{queue.js,browser-polyfill.js}} (Chrome MV3 + Firefox MV2 with polyfill), internal/api/pwa.go (PWAShareHandler at line 241). Context menu IDs smackerel-save-page/smackerel-save-selection registered in background.js. go test passes for internal/api package.

Trace-guard cleanup batch: closed 7 of 10 trace-guard failures. Added Test Plan tables + DoD-trace-prefixes to scopes 2 (Mobile share capture → internal/api/pwa_test.go), 4 (Right-click + Selected text capture → web/extension/background.js), 5 (Offline capture queued + Auth failure preserves queue → web/extension/lib/queue.js + web/pwa/lib/queue.js), and 7 (Extension setup with validation + HTTP security warning → web/extension/popup/popup.js + popup.html). Residual 3 failures are scopes 1, 3, 6 lacking Gherkin scenarios — routed to bubbles.plan ownership. report.md Trace-Guard Closure section appended. artifact-lint PASSED.

Authored 3 Gherkin scenarios across scopes 1, 3, 6 (SCN-MC-008 PWA manifest share target + installable shell, SCN-MC-009 Chrome extension popup title/URL with persisted auth token, SCN-MC-010 Firefox extension WebExtension polyfill + Chrome parity) to close trace-guard residuals. Reused existing scenario-manifest.json IDs. Added Use Cases (Gherkin) and Test Plan subsections referencing web/pwa/manifest.json, web/pwa/sw.js, web/extension/manifest.json, web/extension/popup/popup.js, web/extension/manifest.firefox.json, web/extension/lib/browser-polyfill.js. traceability-guard PASSED (0 warnings); artifact-lint PASSED. No status/certification field changes.

SQS round 9 devops trigger (parent-expanded-child-mode, mappedMode=devops-to-doc): probed CI/CD/build/deploy/observability surfaces for spec 033. Found 1 finding (DEVOPS-033-003 — extension manifest parity not lint-protected); two historical GAP-F bugs (F01 Firefox missing alarms+host patterns, F03 mismatched CSP object-src) were closed by hand with no machine-checked contract preventing the next drift. Routed to BUG-033-001-extension-manifest-parity-not-lint-protected/ and closed end-to-end. Added internal/web/extension_parity_contract_test.go (511 LOC, package web) with 1 live-file test + 1 baseline-sanity test + 7 adversarial sub-tests (one per parity surface: missing-alarms, missing-host-pattern, mismatched-CSP-object-src, mismatched-name, mismatched-version, mismatched-description, extra-perm-in-chrome). Focused run 0.029s, full internal/web/... gate 0.083s, zero regressions. artifact-lint PASS; traceability-guard PASS; state-transition-guard verdict TRANSITION PERMITTED. Spec 033 status unchanged: done. PWA cache-busting and extension version parity confirmed non-findings (already correct). Spec 055 WIP boundary preserved via path-limited git add.

resolvedBugs.summary: Extension manifest parity not lint-protected: added Go contract test (1 live + 1 baseline + 7 adversarial sub-tests) covering MV3/MV2 name/version/description/permissions/host-patterns/CSP-object-src parity invariants; closes GAP-F01 and GAP-F03 regression-protection gaps.
